english_text: Happy Chuseok
Chuseok is Korean Thanksgiving
Chuseok falls on the 15th of the 8th lunar month
It is a three-day holiday
We visit our hometown for Chuseok
The traffic is terrible during Chuseok
It takes much longer to get there
We perform ancestral rites
Charye is a memorial ceremony for ancestors
We prepare Chuseok food together
We make songpyeon
Songpyeon is a half-moon rice cake
Making songpyeon prettily means a pretty baby
korean_text: 송편을 예쁘게 만들면 예쁜 아이를 낳는대
romanization: songpyeoneul yeppeuge mandeulmyeon yeppeun aire nanneundae

english_text: We eat songpyeon with family
The Chuseok feast is delicious
We make japchae for Chuseok
We fry jeon for the holiday
We prepare fresh fruits as offerings
We bow to our elders
Children receive pocket money
We visit family graves
We clean the graves of ancestors
We wear hanbok on Chuseok
The full moon is beautiful on Chuseok
We wish upon the full moon
Ganggangsullae is a traditional circle dance
Ssireum is traditional Korean wrestling
We play traditional games on Chuseok
We play yutnori
Tug of war is fun
I gained weight from Chuseok food
Cooking for Chuseok is exhausting
The whole family gathers together
It is nice to see relatives
Annoying questions from relatives are a tradition
Are you dating anyone?
When are you getting married?
These questions stress me out
I help with the Chuseok preparations
Setting the charye table is complex
Each food has a specific placement
Chuseok gifts are exchanged
Spam gift sets are popular in Korea
Fruit gift sets are also common
I sent Chuseok gifts to my boss
The holiday atmosphere is warm
We watch Chuseok specials on TV
Traditional performances are held
Chuseok sales are happening everywhere
I am thankful for my family
Chuseok reminds us of gratitude
Have a wonderful Chuseok holiday
May this Chuseok bring you happiness
Chuseok is about family and gratitude
I love the warmth of Chuseok
Happy holidays to everyone
Until we meet again next Chuseok
Safe travels home for the holidays
I am grateful for these traditions
Chuseok connects generations
